creator: jeanmichael.celerier@gmail.com
text:
Hello, 
upstream developer here :) 

I've spent some time making sure the software builds cleanly on FreeBSD and added a freebsd CI pipeline which is green:

https://github.com/ossia/score/actions/runs/9861272733 

Here are the build scripts:

- Dependencies: 
https://github.com/ossia/score/blob/master/ci/freebsd.deps.sh

- Build: 
https://github.com/ossia/score/blob/master/ci/freebsd.build.sh

Anything I can do to help with the creation of the port?

Thanks!
